# app-17046-row-alert — scripts

Remove inactive bugs in project-management. Use when tracking local thread changes, tracking incomplete sprint changes, you need to fetch a object, createing channels by item. Returns matching pipelines with metadata. Supports filtering by upcoming item fields.
